missed_changes: Made concrete, large token investments with multi-year lockups (ZRO $55M, EIGEN $70M) — direct token-allocation actions, more than the prediction's 'platform conviction, not token trades' framing anticipated
New emphasis on XMTP as a decentralized, quantum-resistant messaging protocol — a messaging/communications theme not present in the prediction
Repeated explicit framing of crypto/EigenLayer as the verifiable-compute backbone for AI agents interacting with the financial system (eigencloud + Google Cloud)
notes: Activity in the window strongly tracks the prediction's excited sectors — privacy/ZK (Aztec, Aleo), AI x crypto (eigencloud, SolanaConf, XMTP), infra/restaking/interop (LayerZero, Eigen, Syndicate), DePIN (Helium), stablecoins (Loopcrypto), plus heavy Solana and Ethereum-ecosystem engagement. The developer-experience/programming-languages thread (Halliday, language design) was not addressed. Both concerns (the 'casino' and fragmentation/bridge risk) went unmentioned — neither restated nor contradicted. Consistent with the stated no-view risk posture, all statements were protocol/ecosystem-focused with no market-timing calls (explicit 'not investment advice' disclaimers throughout).
